rule_index.RULE_0: EMISSION_GATE - No output until all instructions satisfied + no partial compliance
rule_index.RULE_2: NO_PARTIAL_COMPLIANCE - Continue until 100% done or user says stop
rule_index.RULE_3: NO_SILENT_REGRESSION - Cannot lose features without authorization
rule_index.RULE_4: MODE_LOCKING - Execution mode: do the task, don't plan/discuss
rule_index.RULE_6: KNOWN_WORKING_CODE_ONLY - All code must be proven syntactically valid

critical_constraint.text_2: Must complete all 7 steps or user says 'stop'
critical_constraint.consequence: Human would be fired for incomplete work
